name: Jelly Bean Confetti Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Generously grease and flour a 12 cup fluted tube pan or angel cake pan.
3. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup, then level off.
4. In a small bowl, toss jelly beans with 2 tablespoons of the flour. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, beat sugar, butter, cream cheese, and vanilla until well blended.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Add remaining flour, baking powder, and salt. Blend well.
8. Spoon 1 cup of batter evenly over bottom of prepared pan.
9. Stir jelly beans into the remaining batter and spoon into the baking pan.
10. Bake in a 325 degree oven for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool upright in the pan for 10 minutes.
12. Invert onto serving plate and cool completely.
13. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
